changelog.title: The Complete Studio Guide
changelog.desc: A brand new guide covering every section, every AI tool, every output, in one place. Find it first in your Guides library, or from the dashboard's Guides carousel.

changelog.title: A slower way in, if you want one
changelog.desc: The Complete Studio Guide includes an optional, no-pressure 3 month plan for anyone who'd rather ease into the Studio one piece at a time instead of all at once.

changelog.title: Credits and Strategy & Logistics, explained clearly
changelog.desc: The new guide spells out exactly what uses a credit and what never does, plus what your Strategy & Logistics profile actually does for Director Chat.

changelog.title: Landing and pricing page updates
changelog.desc: Tightened the homepage intro copy, and added reminders on both the homepage and the pricing page that the built-in guide is there if the Studio ever feels like a lot at first.
